title: August 3
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 3''' is the 215th day of the year (216th in leap years), with 150 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1910s#1911|1911]] – [[Alex McCrindle]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Corey Burton]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Sumalee Montano]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Travis Willingham]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 7|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 7]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 111|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 111]] published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – [[Star Wars Insider 77|''Star Wars Insider'' 77]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Michel Parbot]] died.
*[[2011]] – [[Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness 1|''Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness'' 1]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 21|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 21]] published in Germany.
*[[2017]] – "[[Return to the Wheel]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2021]] – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: Palpatine's Contingency Plan|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Palpatine's Contingency Plan]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2022]] – [[Halcyon Legacy 5|''Halcyon Legacy'' 5]] published.
<noinclude>
